title: Testing Infrastructure and Fake Models
description: Test authors use fake models, dummy providers, and test helpers to validate agent behavior without hitting real APIs or LLMs.
use_cases: Configure scripted LLM turn outputs (FakeModel.set_next_output / add_multiple_turn_outputs)
Run agent with fake model returning text/tool-call/error responses
Assert on model inputs received (FakeModel.last_turn_args / first_turn_args)
Override usage stats for billing tests (FakeModel.set_hardcoded_usage)
Stream fake response events (FakeModel.stream_response → yields Created/InProgress/OutputItem/Completed events)
Provide a named model from a string via DummyProvider (DummyProvider.get_model)
Override model_provider on RunConfig with DummyProvider for runner resolution tests
Mock OpenAI async client to inject controlled completions (DummyClient with .chat.completions / .responses)
Stub ModelTracing.is_disabled() to control span creation (DummyTracing)
Record trace/span lifecycle events in memory for assertions (SpanProcessorForTests)
Assert zero spans or traces emitted (assert_no_spans / assert_no_traces)
Fetch chronologically ordered spans for comparison (fetch_ordered_spans)
Normalise span tree into comparable dict structure (fetch_normalized_spans)
Clear span processor state before each test (conftest clear_span_processor fixture)
Prevent accidental real-model calls in tests (conftest disable_real_model_clients fixture)
Simulate MCP tool server with scripted results (FakeMCPServer.call_tool)
Register/list tools on fake MCP server (FakeMCPServer.add_tool / list_tools)
Apply real tool-filter logic via _TestFilterServer wrapper
Return fake MCP prompts and resources (FakeMCPServer.list_prompts / get_prompt / list_resources / read_resource)
Fake TTS model returning zero-byte audio (FakeTTS.run)
Fake STT model returning preconfigured transcripts (FakeSTT.transcribe / create_session)
Fake streamed transcription session yielding turns (FakeSession.transcribe_turns)
Fake voice workflow yielding text chunks (FakeWorkflow.run)
Build synthetic streamed audio input for pipeline tests (FakeStreamedAudioInput.get)

key_classes.name: PromptCacheFakeModel
key_classes.note: Enables prompt-cache key support via _supports_default_prompt_cache_key() -> True

key_classes.name: DummyTracing
key_classes.note: Minimal stub implementing ModelTracing; is_disabled() -> False

key_classes.name: _TestFilterServer
key_classes.note: Bridges FakeMCPServer to real _apply_tool_filter() logic without real I/O

key_classes.name: DummyStream / DummyStreamsContextManager
key_classes.note: Async stdio stream stubs used to patch stdio_client in MCP tests

module_level_helpers: SPAN_PROCESSOR_TESTING: SpanProcessorForTests — singleton registered with DefaultTraceProvider in conftest
fetch_normalized_spans(keep_span_id, keep_trace_id) -> list[dict] — builds parent/child span tree
assert_no_spans() — raises AssertionError if any spans exist
assert_no_traces() — raises AssertionError if any traces/spans exist
get_response_obj(output, response_id, usage) -> Response — builds openai.types.responses.Response from test output items
conftest_fixtures: clear_span_processor (per-test autouse): calls force_flush/shutdown/clear on SPAN_PROCESSOR_TESTING
clear_openai_settings (per-test autouse): resets default OpenAI key/client/transport
disable_real_model_clients (per-test autouse): monkeypatches OpenAIResponsesModel and OpenAIChatCompletionsModel get_response/stream_response to fail unless @pytest.mark.allow_call_model_methods
key_relationships: FakeMCPServer implements MCPServer; delegates filtering to _TestFilterServer
conftest.py imports and configures SPAN_PROCESSOR_TESTING from testing_processor
DummyClient (inline in test files) provides .responses / .chat.completions properties to model constructors
important_notes: FakeModel.turn_outputs is a queue: pop(0) each call — supports multi-turn scripting
FakeModel can raise exceptions mid-turn to test error handling paths
FakeModel.stream_response emits full OpenAI SSE event sequence including delta events per content type (text, function_call, reasoning_summary)
DummyClient classes are defined inline per test function — not a shared module; pattern is consistent across test files
SpanProcessorForTests is thread-safe (threading.Lock); stores spans only on on_span_end, traces only on on_trace_start
fetch_normalized_spans collapses 'task' and 'turn' span types into their parent for cleaner assertions
FakeMCPServer records all tool_calls and tool_results lists for post-run assertions
Real tool filtering logic (_apply_tool_filter) is exercised via _TestFilterServer without any real I/O
